statement: In every magma, Equation 2345 (`x = (y * (y * (y * z))) * z`) implies Equation 4152 (`x * y = ((x * z) * w) * w`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0297
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op y (op y z))) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op x z) w) w)
